comment: Flow_FinalizeEvaBox (§5.10 / phase-2 M2.C+M2.D). EVA + Box finalize in unison inside one Scope. Box folder = UPPERCASE Case/PO; EVA uses lowercase - same identity, two casings. Photo order = 2 previews first (overview w/ full registration + damage closeup) then ALL photos incl. those two again (Evidence sequenceIndex asc). The Sentry REST submit is a TWO-REQUEST photo flow inside the evasentry Function (confirmed against Sentry API v1.2 PDF pp.13,21-23): the 2 preview photos ride as EVA Files {Name,Extension,Data} on POST /Instruction/Inspection (creates the claim, returns Id), then the full ordered set rides on POST /Note/SubmitNote matched by VehReg (+ClmNo) - so the flow passes body/vrm (cr1bd_vrm) and body/clmNo (cr1bd_caseref). EVA_API_ENABLED gates the TRANSPORT (Sentry REST via cr1bd_evasentry when true; JSON drag-drop export staged to Box when false - M1 default + PERMANENT fallback) not the finalization. The Sentry REST token lifecycle lives INSIDE the evasentry Function (Power Platform custom connectors cannot do the OAuth2 client-credentials grant - Microsoft Learn), keyed by function-key; the flow never reads EVA_CLIENT_SECRET. Idempotent by cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash (stamped LAST; the Function also dedups by payload hash in-process). BoxArchiveRootId is a flow parameter, never a hardcoded live Box id. [BUILD]. ACTIVATION [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: bind cr1bd_box (live Box) + cr1bd_evasentry, set BoxArchiveRootId, inject EVA test Client_Id/Secret into Key Vault, set EVA_REQUEST_FROM (EVA-supplied contact code) app setting, flip EVA_API_ENABLED=true in TEST only, run a parity test (drag-drop==API) before any prod cutover. Box can go live on the drag-drop transport (EVA_API_ENABLED=false) BEFORE the Sentry REST path exists. Claude never injects secrets, binds a live account, or flips the prod gate.

metadata.description: Parent Box folder id for archives. Flow parameter; bound by the user at activation. NEVER a hardcoded live Box id.

manual.comment: Invoked when staff request submit (the Code App writes a 'submit requested' signal; the Code App never calls EVA/Box directly).

Init_evaPayload12.comment: The schema-valid 12-field EVA JSON in contract order, built by the SAME serializer the Code App uses (eva-export.ts / eva-payload.schema.json) - byte-identical drag-drop body and API body. vrm/reference are NOT in the 12.

Set_gate_EVA_API_ENABLED.comment: M1 default false -> JSON drag-drop export path (permanent fallback).

Guard_already_finalized.comment: Idempotency latch: re-running finalize for an already-submitted payload hash must not double-submit or re-create the folder.

Order_evidence.comment: Image Evidence accepted for EVA, ascending sequenceIndex (2 previews seeded at index 0,1 then full sequence incl. those two again).

parameters.$filter: _cr1bd_caseid_value eq @{variables('caseId')} and cr1bd_kind eq 100000000 and cr1bd_acceptedforeva eq true and cr1bd_excluded eq false

Create_box_folder_UPPERCASE.comment: Box folder = UPPERCASE Case/PO (toUpper, e.g. EVA test26001 -> Box TEST26001). CreateFolder 409s on a name collision; on resume reuse the folder by name. [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: bind cr1bd_box to the live Box account + set BoxArchiveRootId to the real parent archive folder id at activation; confirm Box honours the UPPERCASE casing (B5).

Upload_photos_in_eva_order.comment: repetitions=1 preserves EVA upload order: 2 previews first, then full sequence incl. those two.

EVA_instruction_inspection.comment: Sentry REST path - the evasentry Function mints/caches the 5-min /Connect/token JWT and attaches the bearer SERVER-SIDE (Key Vault refs); this connector is function-keyed only. The Function maps evaPayload12 (the schema-valid 12-field core, byte-identical to the drag-drop body) to the PascalCase Instruction/Inspection model and performs the TWO-REQUEST photo submission server-side (2 previews on /Instruction/Inspection, then the full set on /Note/SubmitNote). payloadHash echoes the idempotency latch; casePo (lowercase) -> ExternalRef; vrm (cr1bd_vrm) -> VehReg and clmNo (cr1bd_caseref) -> ClmNo are the claim keys the Note request uses to attach the remaining photos. Runs only when EVA_API_ENABLED=true. STAGED (plan: confirm on EVA TEST then enable): base-64 photo bytes are not yet streamed to the Function via body/images - the flow archives the image bytes to Box by storagepath, so today EVA renders the 12-field core and the photos live in the Box archive. To attach photos via the API, add a Get_evidence_content loop (Box CreateFile already proves the bytes are reachable) and pass body/images as [{sequenceIndex, content(base64), role, filename, registrationVisible}] - the Function already orders/splits them. [RESERVED-FOR-USER] to enable/cutover.

Stage_drag_drop_json.comment: M1 default: emit the schema-valid 12-field JSON for staff drag-drop into EVA. Same serializer as the Code App - byte-identical. lowercase Case/PO filename.

Stamp_finalized_hash.comment: Stamp LAST = idempotency latch. status box_synced=100000009 (terminal). A partial failure leaves the hash unstamped so a re-run resumes cleanly.
